Bourbon Friday.description:
Bourbon Friday
Join us at Techartista Central West End on Friday, April 17th, for Bourbon Friday, a weekly social gathering celebrating the St. Louis startup scene. Each week, we come together to share our stories, struggles, experiences, and, yes, a little bit of bourbon.

**Mingle & Tastings // 4-7pm**

**Parking & Transportation**
Street parking is available for Bourbon Friday.
You may also park in the church parking lot across the street from TechArtista.
We are also only a 1-mile Walk from [Central West End Metro Station](https://www.metrostlouis.org/metrolink-station/central-west-end-station/).

**================================**

**18+ to attend without a parent or legal guardian.**
**21+ and up to drink ... obviously.**
**Please Drink Responsibly.**

*Underage drinking will result in removal from the event and a permanent ban from all future events.*

Bourbon Friday
Join us at Techartista UCity on Friday, April 24th, for Bourbon Friday, a weekly social gathering celebrating the St. Louis startup scene. Each week, we come together to share our stories, struggles, experiences, and, yes, a little bit of bourbon.

**Mingle & Tastings // 4-7pm**

**Parking & Transportation**
There is a large free parking lot on the North side of the Lewis Collaborative.
We are also only a 1-mile Walk from the Delmar Loop Station
or
Only a 4-minute Walk from Delmar @ Kingsland Bus Stop

**================================**

**18+ to attend without a parent or legal guardian.**
**21+ and up to drink ... obviously.**
**Please Drink Responsibly.**

*Underage drinking will result in removal from the event and a permanent ban from all future events.*
